title: Backend Developer Vacancy at BEL Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at BEL Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at BEL Ventures Solutions. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Lucknow-based team.

About BEL Ventures Solutions:
BEL Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BEL Ventures Solutions!
